prestazioni: KA24DE (2.4L naturally aspirated) to KA24DE-T (turbocharged) conversion using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.86 A/R, 62mm inducer) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tomei 4-2-1 exhaust manifold, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 18 psi peak pressure on 93 octane fuel

Full forged internals: Eagle 5.7-inch H-beam connecting rods, JE 87mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), ACL Race Series main and rod bearings, and a Tomei 264°/260° duration camshaft set with adjustable cam gears for optimized overlap

Custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a dual-channel wideband AEM X-Series 30-0334 AFR sensor, paired with a Nismo Type-A limited-slip differential (2-way mechanical) and a OS Giken 1.5-way LSD for S14 chassis compatibility, with a custom 4.11:1 final drive ratio for drag strip use
estetica: Vertex Lang II full carbon fiber body kit (S13-specific, not S14) with a 3-piece front lip, side skirts, and a duckbill rear spoiler, all painted in Nissan Racing Yellow (code: 407) with a matte clear coat

Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +22 front and 17x10.5 +30 rear wheels, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires, with custom 5x114.3 to 4x114.3 hubcentric adapters and extended wheel studs for flush fitment

Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion (S13-specific) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, paired with a custom 2-inch extended rear trailing arms and polyurethane bushings for aggressive stance and wheel clearance, finished with a custom rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon
